zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Wake於1299年出生在英國波藍德卡萊爾時，她的父親Baron John Wake Ist Baron of Liddell31歲，母親Joan de Fiennes Briennes27歲。她於1312年與John Comyn -IV Lord of Badenoch結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1349年9月29日在英國英格蘭波藍德隆托享年50歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭費伏登福姆林。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Wake于1299年出生在英国波藍德卡萊爾时，她的父亲Baron John Wake Ist Baron of Liddell31岁，母亲Joan de Fiennes Briennes27岁。她于1312年与John Comyn -IV Lord of Badenoch结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1349年9月29日在英国英格兰波藍德隆托享年50岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰費伏登福姆林。

nameMeanings.name: Wake
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: occupational name for ‘(man of) the watch’, from Middle English wak, wake ‘wake, vigil, watch, period of guard duty’ (Old English wacu, Old Norse vaka). It alternates with the synonymous Middle English wache (Old English wacce), hence the variant Watch. The surname was also interchangeable with Waite (the equivalent Old French term) which, like Wake, was sometimes translated as Latin vigil ‘(one who is) watchful, alert’. Compare the synonymous Vail . When the bearers had high social status, the surname probably denoted an officer with responsibility for the security of a castle, town, or royal person. Compare Wakeman .

variants.name: Vail
meanings: English: occupational name from Old French de la veille ‘of the watch, watchman’, with loss of de; compare Wake . There has been some confusion with the topographic name Vale and the nickname Veal .
Scottish: shortened and altered form of McPhail , Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Phàil ‘son of Paul’.

variants.name: Waite
meanings: English (of Norman origin): occupational name for a watchman, either in a town or castle, from Anglo-Norman French waite ‘watchman, member of the watch’ (of ancient Germanic origin; compare Wachter ). In the Middle Ages the town waits typically combined the functions of watchmen and musicians through being trumpeters or pipers. There may also have been some late confusion with White or Wheat .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Wake was born in 1299, in Carlisle, Cumberland, England, her father, Baron John Wake Ist Baron of Liddell, was 31 and her mother, Joan de Fiennes Briennes, was 27. She married John Comyn -IV Lord of Badenoch in 1312. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 29 September 1349, in Longtown, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50, and was buried in Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Wake est née en 1299, à Carlisle, Cumberland, Angleterre, son père, Baron John Wake Ist Baron of Liddell, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Joan de Fiennes Briennes, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé John Comyn -IV Lord of Badenoch en 1312. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 29 septembre 1349, à Longtown, Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterrée à Dunfermline, Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Wake 1299 in Carlisle, Cumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Baron John Wake Ist Baron of Liddell 31 und ihre Mutter Joan de Fiennes Briennes 27. Sie hat 1312 John Comyn -IV Lord of Badenoch geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 29. September 1349 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Longtown, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Dunfermline, Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Wake è nata il nel 1299 nel Carlisle, Cumberland, England, sua padre, Baron John Wake Ist Baron of Liddell, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Joan de Fiennes Briennes, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato John Comyn -IV Lord of Badenoch nel 1312. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 29 settembre 1349, nel Longtown, Cumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolta a Dunfermline, Fife, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Wakeが1299年にイギリスクウンバーランドカーリスルで生まれた時，父Baron John Wake Ist Baron of Liddellは31歳，母Joan de Fiennes Briennesは27歳であった。1312年にJohn Comyn -IV Lord of Badenochと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1349年9月29日にイギリスイギリスクウンバーランドロントウンで50歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドフィフダンフエルムラインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Wake(이)가 1299년 영국 쿠벌랜드 칼리슬일에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Baron John Wake Ist Baron of Liddell(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Fiennes Briennes(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1312년 John Comyn -IV Lord of Badenoch(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1349년 9월 29일 영국 잉글랜드 쿠벌랜드 론그타운에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 피프 던퍼라이인에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Wake nasceu em 1299, em Carlisle, Cumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Baron John Wake Ist Baron of Liddell, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Fiennes Briennes, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com John Comyn -IV Lord of Badenoch em 1312. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 29 de setembro de 1349, em Longtown, Cumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 50 anos, e foi sepultada em Dunfermline, Fife, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Wake родилась в 1299 г. в местности карлисл, кумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Baron John Wake Ist Baron of Liddell было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Joan de Fiennes Briennes, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Comyn -IV Lord of Badenoch в 1312 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 29 сентября 1349 г. в местности лонгтоун, кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет и была похоронена в местности дунфирмлаин, фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Wake nació en 1299, en Carlisle, Cumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Baron John Wake Ist Baron of Liddell, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Joan de Fiennes Briennes, tenía 27 años. Se casó con John Comyn -IV Lord of Badenoch en 1312. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 29 de septiembre de 1349, en Longtown, Cumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultada en Dunfermline, Fife, Escocia, Reino Unido.
